comment: Network-colour emissive overlay for the Craft Requester. Inherits all geometry from `nodeworks:block/craft_requester` and only overrides the `#0` texture binding to point at craft_requester_emissive.png. Same pattern as storage_meter_emissive / breaker_emissive / user_emissive: any face the artist paints in craft_requester_emissive.png lights up at the network colour with the SAME per-face UV layout craft_requester.json uses.
